title: Open Mic Mondays: $5 Off Pitchers
detail: $5 off pitchers every Monday during Open Mic night.

title: 2-for-1 Beer Specials
detail: Every Wednesday 6–8 PM during Tennessee Dead.

title: Happy Hour: $5 Wells, $6 House Wines
detail: Monday–Friday 2–6 PM: $5 wells, $6 house wines, $1 off drafts and signature cocktails.

title: Happy Hour Specials
detail: Well and house wine specials 5–7 PM (closed Tuesdays).

title: Sunday Jazz Brunch: $20 All-You-Can-Eat
detail: Every Sunday 11 AM–2 PM, live jazz with all-you-can-eat brunch.

title: Wine Not Wednesday: Half-Priced Select Bottles
detail: Half-priced select bottles of wine every Wednesday.

title: Happy Hour Specials
detail: Weekdays 2–6 PM: $12 slice/knot + salad + drink combos and more.

title: 2-for-1 Thursday: Entire Drink Menu
detail: 2-for-1 on the entire drink menu, all day every Thursday.

title: Weekend Brunch: 2-for-1 Mimosas & Bloody Marys
detail: Every Saturday and Sunday alongside the brunch menu.

title: Industry Night: Half Off Select Bites
detail: Every Tuesday — discounted shots and half off select bites with proof of pay stub.
